checks.description: Ensure that any change in dout_valid is only observed after a full eight‑bit sequence has been presented with din_valid asserted, without assuming a fixed latency.
checks.pass_condition: dout_valid transitions from 0 to 1 only after eight consecutive cycles where din_valid=1 and din_serial values have been sampled; no earlier transition is permitted.
checks.trigger_condition: When a legal eight‑bit transfer is driven.

checks.description: Verify that dout_parallel reflects the serial bits in MSB‑to‑LSB order after the eighth valid input.
checks.pass_condition: After eight cycles with din_valid=1, dout_parallel equals the concatenation of the eight din_serial values where the first captured bit occupies bit 7 and the last occupies bit 0.
checks.trigger_condition: When the eighth din_valid=1 cycle occurs.

checks.description: Confirm that dout_valid asserts after the eighth valid bit and remains stable until reset or a new sequence.
checks.pass_condition: dout_valid becomes 1 on the clock edge following the eighth din_valid=1 cycle and does not deassert without a reset or a new sequence start.
